title: How Facebook's Algorithmic Tweaks Affected Engagement with News URLs over Time
snippet: A detailed media review and summary of Fabio Giglietto's research paper presented at the 2026 International Communication Association (ICA) conference in Cape Town. The article outlines Giglietto's findings on how Meta's targeted algorithmic interventions over six years actively shape engagement and news distribution on Facebook.
description: A detailed third-party academic review on snurb.info summarizing Fabio Giglietto's research paper on Facebook's algorithmic tweaks and news engagement, presented at the 2026 ICA conference.

title: M/C Journal 'twitter' Issue Now Out!
snippet: This media announcement highlights the launch of a special commemorative issue of the 'M/C Journal' looking at the 20-year legacy of Twitter. It lists Fabio Giglietto as one of the featured global social media researchers contributing scholarly reflections on X's transition and the future of digital public spheres.
description: A media announcement on snurb.info highlighting the launch of the M/C Journal 'twitter' special issue, featuring Fabio Giglietto as a contributing global social media researcher.

title: Secondo uno studio dell'università di Urbino l'algoritmo di Facebook ora punisce la politica ufficiale e premia gli estremisti antieuropei. Pd e FdI verso una legge bipartisan sulle piattaforme
snippet: This news article reports on a major study published by Fabio Giglietto and his research team at the University of Urbino Carlo Bo [16.1.1]. The study, which analyzed over 2.5 million Facebook posts from 2021 to 2025, revealed that Meta's algorithms severely reduced the reach of official, institutional political pages (-43%) while simultaneously boosting the visibility of extremist and anti-European accounts.
description: An Italian news article reporting on a major study led by Fabio Giglietto analyzing how Facebook's algorithm impacts the visibility of political and extremist content.
